main.description: A confirmed game journey. Published to the user's PDS repo on confirmation. Never written without explicit user action.

gameTitle.description: Game title, baked in at publish time.

coverUrl.description: Cover art URL from IGDB, baked in at publish time. Optional — not all games have a cover.

genres.description: Genre list from IGDB, baked in at publish time.

startedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the game session started.

endedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the game session ended.

log.description: Optional owner narrative, written once at confirmation time. Immutable after publish.
